message:
Fix feature-gate hygiene, clippy lints, and symlink-alias skill dedup

Gate SystemTime/UNIX_EPOCH imports behind #[cfg(test)] in session.rs.
Restructure session_file_stats() so sqlite auxiliary handling compiles
cleanly under both sqlite-sessions and non-sqlite builds with a const
no-op fallback for remove_sqlite_sidecars_best_effort. Suppress
clippy::unnecessary_wraps on the image-resize no-feature stub. Apply
map_or and from_ref clippy suggestions in resources.rs, and add a test
proving symlink aliases to the same skill tree are deduplicated.
Un-gate sqlite_auxiliary_paths() which is now used by both feature paths.
Minor formatting fix in app.rs test.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1185,6 +1185,10 @@ pub(crate) fn resize_image_if_needed(
 }
 
 #[cfg(not(feature = "image-resize"))]
+#[expect(
+    clippy::unnecessary_wraps,
+    reason = "The no-feature stub preserves the feature-enabled Result API at shared call sites."
+)]
 pub(crate) fn resize_image_if_needed(
     bytes: &[u8],
     mime_type: &'static str,
